programme.title: Airtime Ep41: Kayaking The Mighty Rivers of Africa
programme.desc: The world’s top kayakers travel Africa in search of the most dangerous whitewater. Shot over the course of a year, this episode highlights the travel and adventure of world-class kayakers as they embark on a “bigger and better” hunt for the largest waterfalls in a land where emergency services are virtually non-existent.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep601: Paddling Wales – United Kingdom
programme.desc: The Facing Waves team heads to Wales to explore the coast via stand-up paddleboard; surf the legendary Snowdonia inland surf lagoon; and learn the sport of coasteering.

programme.title: Let's Take It Outside Ep103: A Country Like No Other – Costa Rica (Part 2)
programme.desc: Costa Rica is a country like no other: Get ready to chase down Yellowfin Tuna in a pod of Dolphins; hike waterfalls; and trek through the rainforest in search of the perfect surfing beach.

programme.title: Xplash Ep106
programme.desc: Xplash brings you the coolest action in, on, and near water. Today we’ll get soaked in Africa's great Nile River while kayak surfing; Maya Gabeira goes in search of the biggest wave ever surfed by a woman; and our first stop takes us windsurfing in Maui.

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: Kayak Fishing vs TV Sports Reporter
programme.desc: Mike takes Brooke Fletcher, of Bally Sports, out for her first time in a fishing kayak! The former Miss Georgia not only catches her first fish, but also had an amazing time doing it! After fishing in the remote quarries outside of Chicago, Brooke takes Mike into her studio and shows him what it is like to be on live TV every day!

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep243: Powerboat World Championships + New York Yacht Club Invitational + Kitefoil World Tour + Red Bull Sailing Team
programme.desc: Powerboat World Championships + New York Yacht Club Invitational + Kitefoil World Tour in Pingtan, China + Red Bull Sailing Team Profile

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 5: Clean This Mess Up
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we talk with 11x World Surf League Champion, Kelly Slater, about the growing problem of plastic pollution around the world. We learn about the ways he’s chosen to make a difference with his company, Outerknown, and discuss the power of community to make real and lasting change.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 6: Jaws of Consumerism
programme.desc: Olympic Gold Medalist and 5x World Champion, Carissa Moore, shares how people and brands can eliminate single-use plastics. Juan Oliphant and Ocean Ramsey explain how shark populations are a crucial barometer for the health of our oceans. Florence Marine X talks sustainable solutions in packaging!

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: Absinthe Films’ Vivid highlights the breakout years of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi, Nicolas Müller, and Gigi Rüf, delivering some of their most memorable early riding in a fan-favorite classic.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Sebo Walker
programme.desc: In 2022, the art-inspired accessories brand Slowtide launched a summer collection with Portland, Oregon-based artist and skateboarder Sebo Walker. To capture the collaboration, director Jake Price spent a day cruising around Walker’s hometown, seeing the city and learning what inspires his artwork.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: Without a Pedal
programme.desc: Snowboarding Alaska the hard way. An epic winter bike trip down Canada’s Cassiar Highway turns into a test of survival, obsession, and how far you’ll go for the dream.

programme.title: Northbound and Around
programme.desc: Hungry for clips and greedy for turns, Johan Rosen, Garrett “Worm” Warnick and friends spent the season leaving no line unridden and no pillow unsmashed. Driven by the most unsatisfiable of desires, finding good snow, the crew spent the season running from warm temperatures and chasing down a dream. To get to the promised land, they found themselves traveling… Northbound and Around. Featuring: Garrett Warnick, Johan Rosen, Nils Arvidsson, Ryan Paterson, Keenan Filmer, Kareem El Rafie Nils Mindnich, Jess Kimura, Bode Merrill, Ben Bilocq, Brandon Davis, Nick Khattar, Kyle Mack Edited by: Johan Rosen

programme.title: CHANNEL ZeRO
programme.desc: Released in 2020, this Absinthe Films feature highlights the unifying power of snowboarding during a divisive moment in history, celebrating a global community that refuses to be separated by physical or mental barriers.

programme.title: Titans of Business
programme.desc: There have been many stories and documentaries on the Bill Gates’, Steve Jobs’ and Henry Fords’ of the world. What about the thousands of other business people, that had a better idea or way to make life better, cheaper, and faster? People who started out from meager beginnings or limited education, to become very wealthy! Many of these people are among us and act no differently than we do, but they have a success story to tell and tricks of success to share. These are the people profiled in “Titans of Business”.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 2 - Strzegom

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 3 - Le Pin au Haras
programme.desc: Le Grand Complet, the third leg of the 2021 FEI Eventing Nations Cup series is being celebrated in Le Pin au Haras, Normandy. Known as the Versailles for Horses, it provides a fitting location for spectacular competition. Germany is fresh from victory at Strzegom, but France is not ready to lose in home grounds. How will this leg develop?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin Vanquish is timeless and carries the strongest engine of the British brand under its hood. Also: Arden gave a Jaguar a power treatment and transformed the F-Type R to their Arden AJ23. And: the Morgan AR P4 roadster.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The S version of the Jaguar F-Pace is a tough competitor for Porsche Macan Turbo other rivals. Also: Audi launched its SQ7 as the most powerful diesel SUV on the market. And: the Bentley Bentayga, the first luxury class SUV in the world.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Alfieri, Maserati in 2014 celebrated their anniversary with the introduction of a beautiful grand tourer. In remembrance and as part of the three-day celebration, Maserati organised a cruise from Bologna to Torino with some of their most iconic cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: They are big, heavy and embody the American way of driving: luxury SUVs like the Cadillac Escalade, classic pick-up trucks like the iconic Ford F-150 or Uber pick-ups like the Dodge RAM.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin V12 Vantage S Roadster with its 6-litre V12 engine is probably the most amazing export from the UK. In addition: a mountain cruise from dawn to sundown with the Corvette C7 Convertible.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Functional transporters offer high payload and lots of storage space, and the new Volkswagen Crafter is no exception. How does it fare in comparison to the iconic Mercedes Sprinter? Also: the nearly indestructible and also iconic Unimog by Mercedes.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayman GT4 combined the best elements that Porsche could offer. In addition: the Audi R8 V10 plus, an even stronger, lighter and faster version of the original model.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Silvretta Hochalpenstrasse in Austria is the ideal playground for the lightweight power packs Lotus Elise and Roding Roadster. Also: the elegant but still very powerful Porsche 911 Targa 4S.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The tuning company MTM went to work on Audi's already super-powerful S8 luxury sedan and created the S8 Talladega R. Alpina's B6 Biturbo Gran Coupe easily beats its BMW counterpart and makes the road vibrate.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the 6th generation of two US classics, the Ford Mustang GT and the Chevrolet Corvette Z06, these iconic sports cars' history and development over the past decades.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the i8, BMW tried to show the automotive world that they were ahead of their time. But why would anybody pay much more for a car that’s slower and less affordable than the brand's M4 and less spacious than the M5?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We took a look at Mercedes-Benz's first convertible model in their S-class. Also: for the Chevrolet Camaro's 50th anniversary in 2016 the brand released the sixth generation of their classic. And: a mountain cruise with the Corvette C7 convertible.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Three extraordinarily sporty SUVs are the Porsche Macan Turbo, the Mercedes GLA 45 AMG and the Audi RSQ3. Each of these is able to easily cope with each season of the year and, in regards to performance, could be mistaken for a sports car.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: En Route America
programme.desc: A road trip across the West Coast, following skiers as they explore iconic mountains and chase winter conditions across the United States.

programme.title: En Route Departure
programme.desc: Follow Pep Fujas, Blake Nyman, Anthony Boronowski, Dylan Hood, Eric Pollard, Chris Benchetler and more as they chase storms from a Top Secret Military Mountain Warfare Facility, to the Italian Alps.

programme.title: Falling Angels
programme.desc: Three female BASE jumpers trek deep into the Venezuelan jungle to attempt a historic jump from the world’s highest waterfall, facing extreme terrain, technical challenges, and one of the most dangerous exits in the sport.

programme.title: Gunnie Season
programme.desc: An extreme skiing film featuring some of the world’s top professional skiers pushing their limits on snow and steep terrain.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 2 - Port Alfred Classic
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the South Africa WQS Surf Series. This time, we are in Port Alfred at The Royal St Andrews Hotel Port Alfred Classic. Some of South Africa's best waves can be surfed here despite also being one of the most underrated locations. We are in for a thrill!

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Season Review
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 13
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4
programme.desc: Vodice is a famous tourist destination known for many breathtaking beaches and vibrant and rich offer of all tourist attractions. It is known for its liveliness and its friendly hosts. Located on the coast in a wide bay, 11 km northwest ofŠibenik, it is the ideal vacation spot for everyone. Check it out in this episode of Sail-ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5
programme.desc: The region of Imotski is a historical name for the area. We are determined in today's episode to visit this region and a town straight out of a fairytale - magical Imotski. We’ll indulge in natural beauties and set off across the sea to the islands of Iž, Molat and Dugi otok. Stay with us and find out more about this wonderful area!

programme.title: Discovering Murray River
programme.desc: Beppe Faresin is facing a new challenge kayaking across Australia. He explores a land that isn't part of the usual tourist spots which is far from the usual journeys provided by tour operators.

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the Atlantic Cup presented by 11th Hour Racing. Teams of two on a 40-foot race boat gather to race the East Coast of the United States. They will battle the elements and themselves for the right to call themselves Atlantic Cup champions. We will recap on the previous editions action before embarking on this new adventure. Are you ready?

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E07 - William And Kate Into The Future
programme.desc: From a regular student to a royal girlfriend, Kate Middleton has transformed into a real-life princess. In less than ten years, this everyday girl with a normal background captured her prince's heart and is now on track to become the future Queen of England.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E30 - Prince William And Prince Harry Prisoners Of Celebrity
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: This Is The Time

programme.title: Stop Staring At That Stone
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed how two people can be looking at the same thing and have completely different perspectives on it? One might see a problem while the other sees a reason to praise. There might be something in your life that looks like a problem right now, but God is inviting you to pivot so you can see the truth.

programme.title: Your Next Messy Step
programme.desc: This message is for when life feels uncertain and you’re not sure what God wants you to do next. We often look for strategy or certainly, but God’s looking for surrender. Pastor Steven teaches from the life of Jacob how to take the next “messy” step.

programme.title: This May Be Plan C
programme.desc: What do you do when things don’t go according to plan? There might be some things in your path you didn’t expect, and it might be taking longer than you thought, but God’s got you covered. Watch the message to see why you’re still going to get there.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: After a phone call, Pastora says that Clara Inés will go to prison for being an impostor, Elisenda is surprised by the news.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Santiago tells Adriana that thanks to Azalea's psychiatric medical report, the judge agreed to release her on bail. Carlos Raul shows up at that moment.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raúl, César Román and Francesca reconstruct the attack against Azalea, they come to the conclusion that the knife is the one left by Nacho at Francesca's house.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: During an event in Mascarada Rosa is received by Camila to enjoy seeing all her enemies gathered in the same place. Ezequiel and Fausto each celebrate the fall of the other and are united only by their intention to kill Rosa; Marcelina, feels fear and shame; Elda, assures that Rosa is there to take revenge. Projection of the video that shows how Fausto murdered Celso.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel receives a note from El Doliente, anticipating his death. The plan against Rosa Blanco failed. She continues to relate the events of the past; Ezequiel, forcing her to take the murder weapon, managed to get her to be blamed for this murder, for which she paid so many years of unjust imprisonment.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Convinced that Nicolás wants a divorce to try to win back Victoria's love, Florencia refuses to separate; Nicolás makes it clear to his wife that he cannot be tied to her because he does not love her. Late at night, Sergio shows his future wife the apartment they will occupy once they get married; Sergio kisses her passionately. Early in the morning, Clementina finds a sleepless Nicolas at the door of his house waiting for Victoria; Clementina tries to convince Del Casal that Victoria spent the night with Sergio, but Nicolas refuses to lose his beloved; as much as Clementina tries to understand why Victoria will marry a man she does not love and cannot please, Victoria needs the support of her friend as a witness in her marriage, which will take place the next day.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Because the only way to forget Nicolás is to marry Sergio, Victoria asks her future husband to prepare the wedding for the next day. On a new day, Eugenia unburdens herself with Nicolás, because she does not understand how the person she thought could make her happy is now the one who hurts her the most; when Victoria contacts Sergio to tell him that she is ready to go to the headquarters, Nicolás takes his beloved in his arms to take her away. Despite Victoria's efforts to escape from a smitten Nicolas who has kidnapped her to prove his love, Victoria does not manage to escape; Nicolas challenges his beloved to contact Sergio to inform him of her whereabouts. For his part, Sergio approaches Clementina, who - seeing that Victoria is not with Sergio - assumes that her friend has decided to escape from the mistake she was about to make by marrying a man she does not love.

programme.title: CASA Y ESTILO
programme.desc: Programa de entretenimiento que ofrece temas variados, noticias frescas y contenido alegre para mantenerte informado y motivado.

programme.title: CONECTADOS
programme.desc: Programa religioso que ofrece enseñanzas y reflexiones sobre la fe.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto contrata a Antón, un delincuente, para asesinar a Rosa Blanco; Camila y Max, felices, cuentan al Padre Tiziano, sobre su próxima boda. Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila explica a Ezequiel y Julia el motivo de su felicidad: se casará con Max, y también pronto se reunirá con su madre. Por medio de Luciano, Rosa le envía la dirección donde van a encontrarse, pero Elda, rabiosa, copia los datos y los revela al Inspector Torrealba que ordena un operativo policial para detenerla.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila divisa una mujer que corresponde a la descripción de su mamá. Antón, el sicario, también está allí y armado se dirige a ellas. Torrealba ordena a sus hombres correr hacia las mujeres, agarran a Camila y se llevan a la mujer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Sólo Camila debe conocer el contenido de lo escrito en el cuaderno. Su ira y rabia va creciendo y piensa que su mamá tiene el derecho de vengarse. Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños asesinatos están ocurriendo en la ciudad. Una investigadora de lo paranormal y un detective privado se dedican a indagar en el caso y lo que encontraran será algo que nunca imaginaron.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Buenas Noches, Dijo La Señorita Pájaro
programme.desc: Un adulterio, un secreto familiar, un asesino en serie. Una historia fabricada con estructura de muñecas rusas y con ritmo de montañas rusas.

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Choele
programme.desc: Todo ocurre en el pueblo de Choele Choel, provincia de Río Negro. Un niño y su padre intentan seguir juntos todo el verano, pero el chico ya decidió partir hacia otro lugar con su madre, cuando ésta llegue y le recoja. A la zona donde viven llega una chica, por la que comienzan a competir padre e hijo.

programme.title: Cuernavaca
programme.desc: El mundo de Andy cambia totalmente cuando su madre tiene un accidente. Sin nadie que lo cuide, es llevado a Cuernavaca, a la casa de su desconocida abuela paterna. Mientras su madre se debate entre la vida y la muerte, el niño se enfrentará a la frialdad de su abuela, al mundo seductor y peligroso del hijo del jardinero y a la búsqueda de su padre

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas. De la mano de Carolina la ex secretaria de su padre, Marcelo se sumerge en un mundo oscuro lleno de violencia y ambiciones de poder enfrentándose a “El Loco” Bertolini. Pero el peligro no solo lo acechará a él sino también a los suyos. ¿Podrá Marcelo encontrar los verdaderos motivos de la muerte de su padre?

programme.title: El Desertor
programme.desc: Luego de ser reclutado para el servicio militar y ante los abusos de su jefe inmediato, el Subteniente Montilla, Julián escapa del cuartel, lo que provoca una feroz persecución por parte de Montilla, quien se ha enamorado de Sagrario y hará todo lo posible para separar a los jóvenes.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
